name: hcportal_sendEventMessage
description: Sends a message to event participants based on releasability bit flags (admins, members, followers, RSVPs, hares, everyone). Inserts a record into HC.EventMessage, then returns three rowsets: the created message details, FCM tokens for users who qualify for full push notifications, and FCM tokens for users who qualify for in-app-only notifications. Notification preferences and a 6-hour event proximity window gate full push delivery.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: public hasher ID of the user sending the message, validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth. Also used to look up the sender's internal Hasher.id.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token, validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth with @publicEventId as the context identifier.

parameters.name: publicEventId
parameters.description: Required: public event ID the message is associated with. Validated for NULL after auth check.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: Required: client-generated message ID. Used as the primary key for the EventMessage INSERT.

parameters.name: messageTitle
parameters.description: Optional: message title. If NULL, defaults to the event's EventName (resolved in the event lookup SELECT). Prepended with sender's display name before being returned in MessageDetails rowset.

parameters.name: messageContent
parameters.description: Required: message body text. Validation error if NULL or LEN = 0.

parameters.name: messageReleasabilityFlags
parameters.description: Required: bit flags controlling who receives the message. 0x0001=Mismanagement/admins, 0x0002=Members, 0x0004=Followers, 0x0008=RSVPs, 0x0010=Hares, 0x0020=Everyone. Validation error if NULL or if (value & 0x0000003f) = 0.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: MessageDetails
rowsets.description: Returned on success. Always a single row. Contains the created message with sender info. The MessageRelesabilityFlags column name has a typo (missing 'a' in 'Releasability') — do not correct it, callers depend on it.

columns.name: UserDisplayName
columns.description: Hasher.DisplayName of the message sender (computed column)

columns.name: MessageTitle
columns.description: Hasher.DisplayName + ' - ' + EventMessage.MessageTitle — sender name prepended to the title

columns.name: MessageRelesabilityFlags
columns.description: EventMessage.MessageReleasabilityFlags — note: column alias has a typo ('Releasability' misspelled)

rowsets.name: FullPushNotificationRecipients
rowsets.description: Users who should receive a full push notification (sound + popup). Filtered by notification preference = 1 (Always On) or = 4 (On 6 hours before run, only when event is within 6 hours), kennel membership, device FcmToken present, and releasability flags. Zero or more rows.

columns.name: FcmToken
columns.description: Device.FcmToken — Firebase Cloud Messaging token (WHERE FcmToken IS NOT NULL ensures non-null, but declared nullable in Device table)

rowsets.name: InAppOnlyNotificationRecipients
rowsets.description: Kennel followers and members who did NOT qualify for a full push notification. They receive a silent in-app notification for real-time chat updates. Zero or more rows.

sideEffects: INSERT into HC.EventMessage with the new message record (inside transaction)
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
Never correct the 'MessageRelesabilityFlags' column name typo — callers depend on it
Never change the releasability bit flag values (0x0001-0x0020) without updating all callers
Never change the notification preference codes (1=Always, 2=Off, 3=Muted, 4=On 6h before) without updating callers
Never change the 6-hour proximity threshold without coordinating with the API shim and portal
